title: Roadmap Protocol Adoption Survey
desc: 5-dimension evaluation across 10 adoption scenarios. Aggregated into release readiness assessment.

questions.text: How long to define your first roadmap.ts?
Did TypeScript catch your errors upfront?
Did documentation feel sufficient?
What was confusing?
Did the DAG catch a real error in your plan?
Would you have caught this without the tool?
Did contract validation prevent a deployment issue?
How much time did this save? (hours)
Could agent understand 'what to do next' from brief?
Did orient() correctly report your position?
How clear was the 'produces' artifact list?
What context was missing from the briefing?
Did merge()/branch() solve a real problem?
How intuitive was the merge API?
Did checkpoint/restore match your audit needs?
Would you use this for multi-team coordination?
Would you use this in production?
Would you recommend to another team?
Top 3 improvements needed?
What use case would you use it for next?

wouldUseInProduction.desc: ≥70% of scenarios rated 'would use in production'

dagCaughtRealError.desc: ≥80% of scenarios: DAG caught a real error
